title: Have the founders of Palentir and Anduril ever read Tolkien?
abstract: The Lord of the Rings famously includes very strong thematic critiques of industrialization and technological encroachment into everyday life.[0] Tolkien portrays the titular relics, as well as many of the other magical artifacts in Middle Earth like the palentiri, as tools of evil, destructi
abstract_zh: 你们知道吗？ Palantir 和 Anduril 的创始人，他们是不是也被《霍比特人》里的烟雾弹给熏到了？难道他们从未读过托尔金笔下的那些高科技与魔法的较量，难道他们没从《魔戒》里学到点东西？来，咱们一起问问 HN 社区吧！
